title: BetterHarvest
description: Crops can be harvested all at once.
body:
# BetterHarvest Plugin The **BetterHarvest** plugin enhances your Minecraft server gameplay by allowing players to harvest crops more efficiently. With this plugin, you can harvest crops like wheat, carrots, potatoes, beetroots and nether wart effortlessly.
## Features: **Efficient Crop Harvesting**: Players can easily harvest adjacent crops when breaking one crop block. The plugin recursively breaks nearby crops of the same type, making farming more convenient. **Maturity Check**: The plugin checks if crops are mature before allowing them to be harvested. This ensures that players only collect fully grown crops. ## How to install Install the **this plugin** on your Minecraft server **plugin folder**.
